title: funastrum cynanchoides subsp. heterophyllum
intro: Funastrum cynanchoides subsp. heterophyllum, also known as Heteropholis, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Heteropholis include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions. Heteropholis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used to create tinctures and ointments, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
